records.ety: [L. rheumatismus rheum, Gr. <?/<?/<?/<?/, fr.<?/<?/<?/ to have or suffer from a flux, fr. <?/<?/<?/ rheum: cf. F. rheumatisme. See 2d Rheum.]

defs: A general disease characterized by painful, often multiple, local inflammations, usually affecting the joints and muscles, but also extending sometimes to the deeper organs, as the heart.
